score_direction_higher_means: greater basal/HER2-enriched than luminal/normal centroid affinity; approximate pCR-favorable biology
scoring_rule: Spearman correlation to PAM50 centroids using available genes; score=max(Basal,Her2)-max(LumA,LumB,Normal); subtype=max centroid.

score_direction_higher_means: higher approximate poor-prognosis expression pattern; not a pCR-specific direction
scoring_rule: Weighted z-score using negative genefu gene70 correlation weights; clinical MammaPrint cutoff is not reconstructed.

score_direction_higher_means: higher approximate recurrence/proliferation weighted expression; not the commercial recurrence score
scoring_rule: Weighted z-score using non-reference genefu OncotypeDX weights; commercial algorithm is not reconstructed.

classifier_score_name: GGI grade-3 minus grade-1 expression score
scoring_rule: Mean z-score of grade 3 genes minus mean z-score of grade 1 genes from genefu GGI object.

score_direction_higher_means: higher distant-metastasis risk-like expression; not pCR-specific
scoring_rule: Weighted z-score using genefu Wang 76-gene Cox coefficients; ER-specific clinical rule is not reconstructed.

score_direction_higher_means: higher recurrence-risk-like expression in ER-positive/HER2-negative context
scoring_rule: Weighted z-score using genefu EndoPredict GOI weights; clinical calibration is not reconstructed.
Mean z-score of the 18 IFN-gamma profile genes.
Mean z-score of GZMA and PRF1; requires both genes.
